reasoning: Based on comprehensive evidence: (1) Only 2 party bans in German history since WWII (1952, 1956), (2) As of Jan 31, 2025, proposal had 'little chance of passing' with only 124 of 733 MPs supporting (16.9%), (3) No evidence of actual filing with Constitutional Court by May 2, 2025 cutoff, (4) Even if filed on May 2, court proceedings take years - not months, (5) BfV classified AfD as extremist on May 2, 2025 but this doesn't accelerate legal timeline, (6) Only ~2 months between knowledge cutoff and resolution date, (7) Previous NPD ban attempt failed despite intelligence classification. The process is still in political discussion phase, not legal proceedings phase. Completion by July 1, 2025 is effectively impossible.
